response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates 19 years of strong software engineering fundamentals with proven expertise in modern web technologies, architecture, and TDD practices, he is fundamentally misaligned with the role's core requirements. The position explicitly requires deep C++ expertise for embedded industrial systems; Bogdan shows only ~6 months of C++ experience (2014-15) and has built his career entirely in web and backend development. He lacks critical domain knowledge in industrial automation, IoT, embedded systems, cybersecurity (IEC 62443), and the specialized protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, IEC 61850, OPC UA) central to manufacturing automation. His education (CS + Fine Arts) also doesn't meet the specified engineering degree requirement. This is a career-stage pivot too distant to reasonably bridge in this role.
strengths: Extensive engineering experience (19 years) with proven mastery of software craftsmanship—TDD, design patterns, CI/CD, and architecture across diverse systems
Strong full-stack capabilities including Node.js, TypeScript, React, and GraphQL; valuable for modernizing cloud and web integration aspects of industrial solutions
Demonstrated mentoring, technical communication, and community leadership through workshops, open-source projects, and team development at senior levels
concerns: Critical gap in core C++ expertise—only ~6 months documented experience (2014-15); role requires deep C++17+, STL mastery, and multi-threaded systems design
Zero background in industrial automation, IoT, embedded systems, or manufacturing domain; entire career is web/backend focused with no exposure to industrial protocols or cybersecurity standards
Education (Computer Science + Fine Arts degrees) does not satisfy B.E./B.Tech/M.E./M.Tech requirement; no foundation in controls, electronics, or embedded systems engineering

key_factors.factor: C++ and embedded systems expertise gap
Industrial automation and cybersecurity domain absence
Strong software engineering fundamentals and mentoring capability
